title: Ranney, 1856, Dairy System.
content:
Ranney began with just two cows,
            Which he in winter fed on browse,
            And now he hath got mighty herds
            Numerous as flock of birds,
            May he long live our hearts to cheer
            This great and useful pioneer.
meaning:
This evocative piece by James McIntyre, titled "Ranney, 1856, Dairy System.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
